2603.16601.title: Tarab: A Multi-Dialect Corpus of Arabic Lyrics and Poetry
2603.16601.paper_summary: We introduce the Tarab Corpus, a large-scale cultural and linguistic resource that brings together Arabic song lyrics and poetry within a unified analytical framework. The corpus comprises 2.56 million verses and more than 13.5 million tokens, making it, to our knowledge, the largest open Arabic corpus of creative text spanning both classical and contemporary production. Tarab is broadly balanced between songs and poems and covers Classical Arabic, Modern Standard Arabic (MSA), and six major regional varieties: Egyptian, Gulf, Levantine, Iraqi, Sudanese, and Maghrebi Arabic. The artists and poets represented in the corpus are associated with 28 modern nation states and multiple historical eras, covering over fourteen centuries of Arabic creative expression from the Pre-Islamic period to the twenty-first century. Each verse is accompanied by structured metadata describing linguistic variety, geographic origin, and historical or cultural context, enabling comparative linguistic, stylistic, and diachronic analysis across genres and time. We describe the data collection, normalisation, and validation pipeline and present baseline analyses for variety identification and genre differentiation. The dataset is publicly available on HuggingFace at https://huggingface.co/datasets/drelhaj/Tarab.
2603.16601.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了Tarab語料庫，這是一個大型文化和語言資源，將阿拉伯歌曲歌詞和詩歌整合在一個統一的分析框架內。<lb/>該語料庫包含256萬行詩句和超過1350萬個詞元，使其成為我們所知的最大的開放式阿拉伯創意文本語料庫，涵蓋了古典和當代作品。<lb/>Tarab在歌曲和詩歌之間保持了廣泛的平衡，涵蓋了古典阿拉伯語、現代標準阿拉伯語（MSA）以及六種主要的區域方言：埃及語、海灣語、黎凡特語、伊拉克語、蘇丹語和馬格里布語。<lb/>語料庫中的藝術家和詩人與28個現代國家和多個歷史時期相關，涵蓋了從前伊斯蘭時期到21世紀的超過十四個世紀的阿拉伯創意表達。<lb/>每行詩句都附有結構化的元數據，描述語言變體、地理來源和歷史或文化背景，從而使跨類別和時間的比較語言學、風格學和歷時分析成為可能。<lb/>我們描述了數據收集、標準化和驗證流程，並呈現了多樣性識別和類別區分的基準分析。<lb/>該數據集在HuggingFace上公開可用，網址為https://huggingface.co/datasets/drelhaj/Tarab。
2603.16601.author: Mo El-Haj et.al.
